description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a mix of brick and white exterior walls, featuring a flat roof and a prominent front porch with a gray overhang. The front yard is landscaped with small shrubs and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The upper floor includes a balcony area with a blue rectangular pool and outdoor seating, while the lower level has large windows and a covered patio. A red umbrella shades a patio set on the side, and a large potted tree is positioned near the entrance. The house has multiple windows of varying sizes, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design is modern with clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with brick and white walls, flat roof, front porch, balcony pool, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped walkway, front porch, and upper balcony with pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, large windows, red umbrella patio, and covered porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, pool, and back patio area, with the potted tree visible to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick and white wall contrast, upper windows, and the side yard with the tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with a gray overhang, steps, and landscaped approach.
